privileged_info_summary: I verified that the task uses synthetically generated data seeded by utils/seed_data.php and modified by setup_task.sh. The target ticket ('HIPAA audit finding - unencrypted backups') and deal ('Pinnacle EHR Security Upgrade') for account 'Pinnacle Healthcare Systems' are explicitly manipulated by setup_task.sh to simulate a miscategorized escalation scenario. I checked the verifier logic and confirmed it properly evaluates escalating the ticket to 'Urgent'/'Critical' and 'In Progress', updating the deal to 'Negotiation/Review' (75% probability, closing on 2026-05-31), and scheduling a meeting matching 'HIPAA Emergency Remediation - Pinnacle Healthcare' on 2026-03-15 at 09:00, all directly reflecting the prompt instructions.
